race.comment: Moderate race. CASTLEFIELD FLYER (6) raced over a little further last time but well below best and stewards reported pulled up lame. Has been freshened for this and previous form would have seen her go close. Gets chance to atone. The scratchings will definitely help the chances of OLIVIA'S SCANDAL (3) who might get to lead on her own now that DIMORA QUEEN has come out. Versatile mare with solid figures at the trip and expected to run well. Went back and stormed home to score from a wide gate last time and off a better draw expected to roll forward if no-one wants to lead. Gets chance to make it back-to-back wins. FIRST FIFTEEN (4) wasn't away last time and can sneak a place.  MUM 'N' ME (9) is fitter for two runs back and should improve.
